note: Aggregator::aggregate sets object handle for MicroSimulator via ObjectHandleContainer.setFromAggregationIfNotSet
Aggregator::aggregate sets object handle for MultiThreadingScheduler via ObjectHandleContainer.setFromAggregationIfNotSet
Aggregator::aggregate sets object handle for AggregatableRunner via ObjectHandleContainer.setFromAggregationIfNotSet
Aggregator::aggregate sets object handle for SignalHandler via ObjectHandleContainer.setFromAggregationIfNotSet
Aggregator::aggregate notifies AggregatableRunner of updated aggregation
MultiThreadingScheduler::schedule logs 'Scheduling ...' for the scheduled task
AggregatableRunner.runAllStages invokes scheduler run at stage INIT
AggregatableRunner.runAllStages invokes scheduler run at stage NORMAL
AggregatableRunner.runAllStages invokes scheduler run at stage FINAL
Inside MultiThreadingScheduler::run(FINAL): logs 'Starting Scheduler in new thread'
MultiThreadingScheduler::runSchedule in new invoker thread: 'Starting Scheduling'
MultiThreadingScheduler::runSchedule loop: 'Waking up at ...' before executing the task
MultiThreadingScheduler::runSchedule loop: 'Executing task ...' for the scheduled task
MultiThreadingScheduler::stop: 'Joining <eventName>' before joining the task thread
